headline: Work-related illness Preparation Checklist — Saint George
articleBody:
Work-related illness Preparation Checklist for Saint George Clients

Before your Work-related illness appointment with Just Work Comp Law, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Incident report
2. Medical records
3. Witness statements
4. Employer notification
5. Doctor notes

Contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 to get started.
